SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Trusted Valley Cooling & Heating

Founded in 2012, Horizon HVAC began with one truck and a mission to provide honest HVAC service to Phoenix homeowners. Our founder, a third-generation Arizonan, knew firsthand how critical reliable cooling systems are for desert living.

We approach every job like it's our own home - taking time to diagnose issues properly and explain options clearly. No upsells, just straightforward solutions built to withstand 110°F summers.

As active members of the Greater Phoenix community, we support local youth sports teams and participate in heat relief programs during dangerous summer months.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Hvac

Desert-Proven Systems

We specialize in HVAC configurations that handle Phoenix's extreme temperatures and dust storms.

Local Technicians

Our team lives in the communities we serve and understands local housing structures.

Preventative Focus

We help extend system life in harsh conditions with seasonal maintenance plans.

Emergency Response

24/7 availability when summer breakdowns threaten your comfort and safety.

Beat the Heat Before It Hits

Schedule your pre-summer AC tune-up today and avoid emergency repairs during peak season.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-hva-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

When our AC died during July's heatwave with my 85-year-old mother at home, Horizon had a tech here in 90 minutes. He not only fixed our capacitor issue but noticed our ductwork needed sealing - something no other company had mentioned in years. Lifesavers!

Marta R. Emergency AC Repair
“

The team installed a new system in our 1978 Arcadia home and took extra care working around our original architecture. They explained why a slightly smaller unit would work better than what others quoted, and our electric bill dropped 30% this summer.

James T. AC Installation
“

We've used Horizon's maintenance plan for three years now in our Chandler home. Last spring they caught a refrigerant leak before it became an emergency - in August that would've been catastrophic. Worth every penny for peace of mind.

Lisa and Dan P. Preventative Maintenance
“

Our second-floor bedrooms in Tempe used to be 10 degrees warmer than downstairs. After Horizon sealed our ducts and balanced the system, the temperature difference is only 2 degrees even in 110°F weather. Huge difference in comfort.

Carlos M. Duct Sealing
“

We were skeptical about a heat pump in Phoenix, but Horizon explained how the new models handle our climate. Two winters and one summer in, it's been flawless. Their seasonal maintenance keeps it running efficiently year-round.

Sarah K. Heat Pump Services
“

Installed a new unit in our Scottsdale home last fall. The crew showed up on time, protected our tile floors, and cleaned up perfectly. Most impressive was their post-install follow-up to ensure everything was performing optimally as temperatures rose.

Robert G. AC Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a new AC installation take in Phoenix?
Most single-family homes can be completed in one day, though historic properties may require additional time for custom retrofitting. We work efficiently to minimize your time without cooling.
What size unit do I need for my 1970s ranch home?
Vintage Phoenix homes often need special consideration due to original construction methods. We perform Manual J calculations to determine exact needs rather than relying on square footage alone.
